global.description: The ad features a solid blue background with an app interface mockup and prominent text.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial app with a focus on clarity and rewards.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: App interface mockup
elements.description: A rectangular mockup of an app interface with rounded corners, featuring placeholder shapes for cards and buttons.

elements.label: Card design elements
elements.description: Two overlapping shapes resembling a card and a button, designed in a light blue color.

elements.label: Additional card element
elements.description: A rectangular shape that looks like a card, positioned within the app interface mockup.

elements.label: Card and button layout
elements.description: A layout featuring a card and button design, with a light blue color scheme.

elements.label: Highlighted card element
elements.description: A prominent rectangular shape that resembles a highlighted card within the app interface.

elements.label: Secondary card design
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape that resembles a secondary card design within the app interface.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Your money, clearer' positioned at the bottom of the ad, conveying the main message.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Fast Claim reward

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'ClearLedger' in a simple font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, clean and modern, app interface, financial rewards
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the headline is at the bottom, and the app interface mockup is centered.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ClearLedger, Your money, clearer, Fast Claim reward
